goal: Add a dev-only local EmailRecovery harness for testing Level 3 zk-email recovery without deploying unsafe bypasses to production
decisions: Harness exposes acceptGuardian and processRecovery from EmailRecoveryManager, not recover() directly
Tests call real completeRecovery(account, recoveryData), not internal recover()
Harness lives in test/harness/ not in production src/
Deploy scripts hard-revert on non-local chain IDs (31337/31338/31339)
make deploy-local unchanged - deploys production-equivalent stack
Separate make deploy-email-recovery-local-harness for harness only
next_steps: Test against real ZK Email staging relayer
Add Supabase JWT validation to zk-email-recovery-api
Fix legacy 96-byte path nonce increment in EmailRecovery.sol
